rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts has no relation to Gov't Code §2306.034, which governs disqualification of board members and employees based on trade association affiliations.
quote: A person may not be a member of the board and may not be a department employee employed in a "bona fide executive, administrative, or professional capacity,"
_note: No conflict; the rule_text concerns board member disqualification, unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
